variables.name: additional_args
variables.description: Additional command-line arguments to pass to code-server (e.g., '--disable-workspace-trust').

variables.name: agent_id
variables.description: The ID of a Coder agent.

variables.name: auto_install_extensions
variables.description: Automatically install recommended extensions when code-server starts.

variables.name: extensions_dir
variables.description: Override the directory to store extensions in.

variables.name: folder
variables.description: The folder to open in code-server.

variables.name: install_version
variables.description: The version of code-server to install.

variables.name: offline
variables.description: Just run code-server in the background, don't fetch it from GitHub

variables.name: open_in
variables.description: Where to open the app: "tab" or "slim-window" (default).

variables.name: port
variables.description: The port to run code-server on.

variables.name: use_cached
variables.description: Uses cached copy code-server in the background, otherwise fetched it from GitHub

variables.name: use_cached_extensions
variables.description: Uses cached copy of extensions, otherwise do a forced upgrade

variables.name: workspace
variables.description: The path to a `.code-workspace` file to open in code-server. Mutually exclusive with `folder`.
